description: A graphic over a photograph of open blue ocean with a Coast Guard helicopter overhead and two boats, one a civilian vessel crowded with people and a smaller orange Coast Guard boat alongside. Centered text reads 'ANYONE ATTEMPTING TO ILLEGALLY ENTER CUBA AND RETURN TO THE U.S.,' with 'WILL BE STOPPED' in red below, followed by a smaller information line and a U.S. Coast Guard Southeast District seal.
notable_text: ANYONE ATTEMPTING TO ILLEGALLY ENTER CUBA AND RETURN TO THE U.S., WILL BE STOPPED; U.S. COAST GUARD SOUTHEAST DISTRICT
